title: Weight System
description: A mod that introduces a weight system into Minecraft, supporting recursive backpack calculations and configurable color HUD.
body:
- Added weight attributes to Minecraft; items, blocks, decorations, and more now have weight, and the player's maximum carrying capacity is 100.
- When the weight percentage is less than 50%, there is no impact. When the weight percentage is greater than 50%, the movement speed becomes 0.8 times faster. When the weight percentage is greater than 80%, the movement speed becomes 0.5 times faster. When the weight percentage is greater than 100%, the movement speed becomes 0.2 times faster.
- Three types of chest armor enchantments have been added. Weight lifting can increase the player's maximum load capacity, powerless will decrease the player's maximum load capacity, and overwhelming strength will force the weight of items on the player to be 0.
- Equipped with a sophisticated backpack mod, different levels of backpacks provide varying proportions of weight reduction for the items inside.
- Press H to open HUD SETTING.
- Multiple instructions
```
/weight max <player> <max weight>
```
Modify the player's maximum carrying capacity limit

```
/weight reset <player>
```
Reset player carrying capacity limit

```
/weight set <itemid> <weight>
```
Set the item's weight to <weight>

```
/weight default <itemid>
```
Reset item weight to default

```
/weight resetall
```
Reset the weight of all items to default

```
/weight ratio <backpackid> <ratio>
```
Set the conversion ratio for the backpack
```
/weight get <backpackid>
```
Get the conversion rate of the backpack

```
/weight speed add <percent> <multiplier>
```
Add movement speed penalty rule: When the weight percentage is greater than <percent>, the player's movement speed is multiplied by <multiplier>

```
/weight speed list
```
Get movement speed penalty rules

```
/weight speed remove <percent>
```
Remove movement speed penalty rule

```
/weight speed reset
```
Reset movement speed penalty rules to default
